access_key.description: Weatherstack API access key. Sent as the access_key query parameter on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Weatherstack API base URL override for tests or proxies.

query.description: Location query (city name, coordinates, IP, or zip) forwarded as the query parameter on every stream's request. Also used to derive the synthetic id field's suffix, matching legacy's fallback id.

historical_date.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) forwarded as the historical_date query parameter on the historical stream.

forecast_days.description: Number of days forwarded as the forecast_days query parameter on the forecast stream.

units.description: Optional measurement unit system (m=metric, s=scientific, f=Fahrenheit) forwarded as the units query parameter on current/historical/forecast/marine when set. Weatherstack defaults to metric server-side when omitted.

language.description: Optional 2-letter ISO language code forwarded as the language query parameter on current/historical/forecast/marine when set.

latitude.description: Latitude forwarded as the marine stream's latitude query parameter. Required for the marine stream only (Weatherstack's marine endpoint takes coordinates, not the query location string every other stream uses).

longitude.description: Longitude forwarded as the marine stream's longitude query parameter. Required for the marine stream only.

autocomplete_query.description: Location text forwarded as the autocomplete stream's query parameter (partial city/region/zip/IP text for typeahead matching). Required for the autocomplete stream only; independent of the query key every weather-data stream uses.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
